creator: sergey@akhmatov.ru
text:
Created attachment 204723
py-ncclient-0.6.6

Update net-mgmt/py-ncclient to version 0.6.6

Changes: https://github.com/ncclient/ncclient/releases/tag/v0.6.6
- Read ssh timeout from config file if not specified in method call
- Tox support
- Huge XML tree parser support
- Adding optional bind address to connect

QA:
poudriere build: OK with all flavors on 11.2 and 12.0
